root.name: Change title text on first slide to 'French Architect: Jean-Nicolas-Louis Durand'
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly and completely changed the title text on the first slide, without making unwanted changes elsewhere.

children.name: Title text on first slide is exactly 'French Architect: Jean-Nicolas-Louis Durand'
children.description: Checks that the first slide's title text was changed and matches exactly the required string.

children.name: No extraneous changes to first slide except title
children.description: Checks that the only change to the first slide is the title text, with no changes to layout, other text, elements, notes, animations, or transitions.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides
children.description: Checks that no slides except the first slide were changed (content, layout, notes, animations, transitions, etc.).

metadata.task: Change the title text to 'French Architect: Jean-Nicolas-Louis Durand' on the first slide
